11:30AM C/C FOR CT. TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/GEORGE M. CARR AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT W/FRANK R. PETTEWAY AS COUNSEL. CASE SETTLED AFTER EXTENSIVE NEGOTIATIONS FOR STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FOR PL. ON FOLLOWING TERMS - $24,191.00 PRINCIPLE - $3,00.00 COSTS - TO BE PD IN 3 INTALLMENTS ($10,00 BY 10-24-96, 5PM - $7,00 BY 11-25-96, 5PM $7,191 PLUS $3,000 COSTS BY 12-23-96, 5PM) - PMTS ARE TO BE MADE AT MR. CARR'S OFFICE AT 120 MONT- GOMERY ST, SUITE #2300, S.F, CA. - IF ALL PMTS. ARE MADE ON TIME, PL. WILL WAIVE $3,000 COSTS. IF ANY PMT. IS LATE, THE ENTIRE BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT IS DUE INCLUDING THE $3,000 COSTS & A WRIT OF EXECUTION & ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT MAY ISSUE UPON APPLICATION OF PL. ATTY. FOLLOWING 24 HRS. NOTICE TO DEF. ATTY. NEITHER PARTY IS TO CONTACT THE OTHER PARTY OR ANY OFFICER OR AGENTS OF THEIR CORPORATIONS & ANY CONTACT SHALL BE THROUGH THEIR ATTYS. IF ALL PMTS. ARE MADE TIMELY, PL. ATTY WILL FILE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE STIPULATION & JUDGMENT.
